entity.summary: France-based regulated crypto investment and trading platform offering buying, selling, trading, staking, and related digital-asset services.
entity.notes: Modeled as hybrid because the platform combines exchange-like buy, sell, and trade functions with broader investment and staking services. The first-party site states operation since 2014 and current French MiCA authorization.

evidence.title: Coinhouse official platform website
evidence.notes: First-party site exposes active buying, selling, trading, staking, and account services and states operation since 2014.

evidence.title: Coinhouse exchange registry entry
evidence.notes: Registry source corroborates the historical Coinhouse exchange identity.
